description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult male pedestrian, depicted in a neutral standing pose with arms extended horizontally. He is dressed in a fitted short-sleeve t-shirt, slim trousers, and formal shoes, with a visible belt at the waist. The figure has a medium build and realistic body proportions, with defined facial features and a full head of voluminous, styled hair. The clothing fits closely to the body, and the shoes are low-profile and formal in appearance. The overall look is casual yet slightly refined, suitable for an urban environment such as a city street or park. The model's posture and attire suggest he is ready for everyday activities in a modern urban setting.
description: A casually dressed adult male standing with arms outstretched, wearing a fitted t-shirt, slim trousers, and formal shoes, with styled hair and a neutral expression.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest, belt, and full arm span with hands open.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the fitted nature of the clothing, and the shoe shape.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shoulders, belt, and the back of the trousers and shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, arm, and the side seam of the clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeve t-shirt, slim trousers, formal belt
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
